text_preview:
* Case related to Case ARX.0.0.586, reported by the same family about 1 hour before this other communication registered in this file ARX.0.0.585 *

NOV 5th, 2000. Time: 01h05 am. For the second time in one night, members of the same family – in Juvevê, a district of Curitiba, State of Paraná – called the Air Force to report the sighting of two (2) unidentified flying objects zigzagging very close to the buildings in front of their apartment. The UFOs, as described in the previous report [ARX.0.0.586] were shaped as luminous dots and yellowish white in color and this time one of them was emmiti
summary: The same Curitiba family called COMDABRA a second time in one night to report two yellowish-white zigzagging UFOs, one now emitting sparks, flying below buildings.
